## Checklist
- [ ] Edited the skill under `skills/<name>/` (not the `.skill` zip by hand)
- [ ] Ran `scripts/package.sh <name>` (or `scripts/package.sh`) — frontmatter validates, zip rebuilt
- [ ] `SKILL.md` stays lean (< 500 lines); detail lives in `references/`
- [ ] No emoji in skill files; `name:` matches the folder
- [ ] The skill still states its own honest limits (no overselling)
